real_interview.content: <synch>
<laughter>

IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
yes
okay_confirm (okay)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
i'm doing well
thats_good (that's good)
where_originally (where are you from originally)
i was born in oakland
really (really)
like_about_LA (what are some things you really like about l_a)
um <sigh> all the different areas of the city
uh the different cultures that are here
mhm (mhm)
dont_like_LA (what are some things you don't really like about l_a)
the traffic the
um lack of public transportation
and the superficiality
see_mean (i see what you mean)
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
<laughter>
i i don't i would love to travel more
travel_changed (what do you enjoy about traveling)
um <sigh>
being able to experience a different way of living
um getting outside the bubble that you normally live in and
getting a different perspective
uh_huh (uh huh)
travel_trips (i'd love to hear about one of your trips)
um in two thousand eight i studied abroad in brazil and that was about four months
and i was in bahia which is in the north and um
let's see the program consisted of learning the history learning the language and staying with a homestay family
nice (nice)
change_directions (what made you decide to do that)
um i've always wanted to travel and i chose brazil because um
they have an afro-brazilian population or a large afro-brazilian population which i really wanted to learn more about and i think the history and the cullture is really interesting
mhm (mhm)
memorableB (what's one of your most memorable experiences)
um
i think taking a bus by myself to
a remote beach and just navigating on my own and um figuring out where to go
yeah
thats_great (that's great)
study (what did you study at school)
right now i'm getting my master's in social work
dream_job (what's your dream job)
<laughter>
dream job <sigh> i think to um consult about um mental health and
how to um
how to intervene effectively with different cultures
and doing research and consulting work and getting to travel
um
basically that those would be the main characteristics
okay_confirm (okay)
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
i think that's a false dichotomy
but i do consider myself shy but at the same time outgoing in the sense that i push myself to do things outside of my comfort zone
and i'm determined to do what it takes to become successful
makes_sense (that makes sense)
relax_fishtank (sometimes when i'm feeling tense i turn on the fish tank screensaver hey i know it's not hawaii but it's the best i've got what do you do to relax)
<laughter>
um i listen to music
and just lay on my bed and
um
i guess you could say do mindfulness and really just take my mind off of things
mhm (mhm)
also breathing exercises which i'm learning more about um as well as exercise
cool3 (cool)
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
pretty good i don't get angry a lot
um
so as far as angry temperament i'm pretty good at that
thats_good (that's good)
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
hmm
um
mm what month is this may
probably two months ago
and i argued
via text message <laughter> so it's not really intense arguing but
i guess you could call it arguing in a sense over whether or not i should be forgiven for something that i thought was minor
um
with a friend i've had for a few years
hmm_downer (hmm)
describe_felt (how did you feel in that moment)
i felt anxious
um
sad and angry
um
yeah those are the main emotions
downer (okay)
how_know (how do you know them)
i know them because i think i'm pretty in touch with my emotions and being able to identify them
and then i'll notice the physical
uh manifestations of emotions like if i if my heart's racing or if i'm getting sweaty
if i'm <sigh> if my breathing is more shallow i'll know i'm anxious i'll know something's bothering me
mhm (mhm)
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
hmm <laughter>
that i wish i had handled differently
i guess related to this argument um
i went out one night and got
a little too intoxicated and <clears throat> ended up
calling a person for a ride
home but that
really upset that person
and i know that
it wasn't such a big deal but i wish i hadn't have let myself get to that point um
it it impacted a relationship and i also felt really bad about what i did
okay_confirm (okay)
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
mm
<clears throat>
hardest decision <sigh>
wow um
probably deciding what type of graduate program to go into i briefly went to law school and decided not to do that so afterwards
well after dropping out i had to really
rethink what it is that i wanted to do and what i wanted to
dedicate my life to go into debt for spend a lot of energy on
yeah_downer (yeah)
hard_decision (how did you decide to do that)
um <sigh>
i think by recognizing what i don't want to do
and doing a lot of research on
program requirements and the jobs that you can get after completing a program
makes_sense (that makes sense)
memory_erase (tell me about an event or something that you wish you could erase from your memory)
<sigh> mm <sigh> i have to think <sigh>
oh <laughter>
um
revolving around the same person i spoke of earlier
it was a dating relationship and
a few years ago we had a falling out
over his treatment of me
and it involved
another person and i wish i could
get that out of my mind
sorry_hear (i'm sorry to hear that)
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
um <laughter>
<laughter>
i have a pretty good relationship with my mom she lives in the bay area i didn't grow up with her but i've gotten
um closer to her as an adult
uh we talk pretty regularly
with my dad i grew up with him
mostly he lives in atlanta and
um we don't talk as much but
we are
we have a pretty decent relationship it's not really that
contentious or anything
and i'm an only child so i don't have siblings i don't have a large family
uh_huh (uh huh)
um so
in general i'm not really that close to family
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
um
one person is my mentor who i met in two thousand five
and she's a judge and i met her when i was in community college and she really
opened my eyes to possibilities and made me feel that i would be able to achieve certain things
thats_great (that's great)
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
<sigh> pretty easy well it's easy for me to sleep what's not easy is getting up
why2 (why)
because usually i do not forward <f> look forward to what i have to do that day
and the thought of it is
you know just makes me wanna stay in bed also i wake up pretty tired
not really feeling refreshed
understand (i understand)
<clears throat>
symptoms_cope (how do you cope with them)
i think just <sigh>
self-talk about how what i have to do
isn't that bad or that the things that i'm doing now are gonna end pretty soon with the end of the school year
um
trying to think of things that
i can look forward to in the week um also listening to music
and browsing the internet kinda gets my mind going
mhm (mhm)
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
<sigh> feeling <sigh>
uh wow um
feeling
emotionally drained on some ways and
at the same time feeling like i've accomplished a lot and that i've grown
so a mix of ambivalence and feeling drained and a mixture of
feeling accomplished and proud at the same time
uh_huh (uh huh)
ptsd_diagnosed (have you ever been diagnosed with p_t_s_d)
no i haven't
depression_diagnosed (have you been diagnosed with depression)
yes
when_diagnosed (how long ago were you diagnosed)
in two thousand six
why_seek_help (what got you to seek help)
the convergence of a lot of stressful factors um
i was out of touch with my mom i started um well i had transferred to a university that was pretty rigorous
and just all those changes going on
really um
exacerbated
things that were already there depressive tendencies that were already there
and it got to a point where i just felt really overwhelmed
yeah_downer (yeah)
therapy_going (do you still go to therapy now)
yes i do
therapy_useful (do you feel like therapy is useful)
yes
therapy_changes (what sort of changes have you noticed since you've been going to therapy)
i notice
i'm better able to
accept my emotions and not judge them and also identify them
i'm <sigh>
able to think <th>
think differently about things that happened maybe look at things in a more positive light
and also identify
the areas i need to work on and the underlying issues in those areas
<clears throat>
thats_good (that's good)
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
mm <sigh>
um this past weekend
i reconnected with some old friends and it was really good to see them and be back in touch again
awesome (awesome)
BF_describe (how would your best friend describe you)
<laughter> um <sigh>
people have different takes on on me i don't have one best friend but i think people would describe me as very
um analytical
sensitive intelligent
intellectual
uh_huh (uh huh)
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
um
i wish that i did not
or wait
i wish
i was better able to cope with my anxiety and depression which i'm working on
and <sigh> i wish that i had more energy
okay_confirm (okay)
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
<laughter>
start going to therapy now <laughter> um
but yeah i really would and
also
to
what how old am i twenty eight
ten years ago eighteen okay so graduating from high school
i would <sigh> tell myself to pick up some more job skills so that i wouldn't have to struggle as much in the future
and to seek out mentors to get a clearer um idea of what i wanted to do as a career
okay_confirm (okay)
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
um
i think the fact that i'm in grad school
and
coming from the background that i that i come from
low socio-economic status and
just pushing through
challenges to get here
good_hear (that's so good to hear)
<laughter>
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
you're welcome
bye (goodbye)
bye
